---
title: "Merna Saad"
image: "assets/Merna.png"
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:merna.s.saad@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/merna-s-saad
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/merna-saad
---

## Current

- **M.S. Business Analytics** | [UCSD Rady School of Management]{.teal}

---

## Work History

- **Bank of Egypt** | SVP, Strategic Venture Manager | [2020 - 2023]{.gold}
- **Corplease S.A.E** | Manager, Corporate & Credit | [2018 - 2020]{.gold}
- **Corplease S.A.E** | Senior Officer, Corporate & Credit | [2016 - 2018]{.gold}
- **Corplease S.A.E** | Officer, Corporate & Credit | [2014 - 2016]{.gold}

---

## Education

- **M.S. Business Analytics** | [UCSD Rady 2026]{.teal}
- **B.S. Architectural Engineering** | [American University in Cairo 2014]{.teal}
- **B.B.A. Finance** | [American University in Cairo 2014]{.teal}

---

## Academic Projects

- **Marketing Campaign Response Prediction** | [UCSD Rady Winter 2026]{.gold}
  <br>Logistic regression, random forest & XGBoost for campaign response modeling
- **FIFA 2026 World Cup Winner Prediction** | [UCSD Rady Fall 2025]{.gold}
  <br>Classification & ensemble methods on historical match data
- **Web Mining & Recommender Systems** | [UCSD Rady Fall 2025]{.gold}
  <br>Collaborative filtering & content-based recommender systems

---

## Skills

- **Languages:** Python, SQL, Excel VBA, Git
- **ML & Stats:** Regression, Classification, Clustering, XGBoost, NLP, A/B Testing
- **Tools:** Jupyter, Tableau, Plotly, ETL Pipelines
